case_title: UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. PATRICK, DONALD

docket_entries.description: SERVICE FEE EXEMPLIFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK, DONALD
